back: Software that helps programmers write, test and debug source code.

front: What are the main functions of an IDE?

back: A tool that allows programmers to write and edit source code.
A feature that allows programs to run and be tested, showing output and errors.

front: What is the role of a translator in an IDE?
back: It converts source code into machine code so the program can be executed.

front: What types of translators are used in an IDE?

back: Tools that identify and help fix errors, often showing line numbers and messages.
A feature that suggests keywords or variable names as the programmer types.
A feature that automatically fixes simple spelling or syntax mistakes.
A feature that formats code with indentation and layout to improve readability.
They help programmers quickly locate errors in code.
A feature that uses colours to make different parts of code easier to read.
They help programmers work more efficiently and reduce errors when writing code.
